## desired
<!-- What should happen instead? -->

## current
<!-- What is happening right now? -->

## hint
<!-- Optional clues, logs, screenshots, or related links -->

## scope
<!-- Which files, workflows, or conventions are affected? -->

## acceptance
<!-- What must be true for this issue to be done? -->
